input.user_input: Replace all references to 'Acme Corp' with 'Pinnacle Technologies Inc.' throughout the agreement. There are probably 15–20 instances.

actual: Please upload or provide the agreement you would like me to edit. Once you share the document, I will locate all instances of "Acme Corp" and replace them with "Pinnacle Technologies Inc." for you.
